'''Kybacca''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who served as a senior [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. She opposed allowing former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] to serve in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]].<ref name="SWE" /> When translated into [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], the suffix in Kybacca's name, "Bacca," meant "Ally/Friend/Sister."<ref name="Gamer">{{GamerCite|10|Callsigns: Names of Kashyyyk}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kybacca was first mentioned in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', authored by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], and published by [[Del Rey]] in [[1998]]. The ''Encyclopedia'' sources the entry to [[Kristine Kathryn Rusch]]'s [[1996]] novel, ''[[The New Rebellion]]''.<ref name="SWE" /> However, the novel makes no mention of any Kybacca. Instead, it is [[Kerrithrarr/Legends|Kerrithrarr]] who is the senior Wookiee senator, and who is one of the few senators to oppose the election of former Imperial officials to New Republic positions.<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>
